questions.question: What country is second only to the U.S. in carbon dioxide emissions?
Whose father dies in a brothel, in Mark Twain's original handwritten manuscript?
What socialist writer's last words were: 'Last words are for fools who haven't said enough'?
What Manhattan natives, numbering seven million, have sex up to 20 times per day?
What major league baseball team was the first in 86 years to win 60 of its first 80 games?
What does a priest distribute with an aspergillum?
